channel.title: Nlp.stanford.edu on Chege's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Nlp.stanford.edu on Chege's Blog

item.title: [ToDo] An Introduction to Information Retrieval
item.description:
• Boolean retrieval
  • The term vocabulary & postings lists
  • Dictionaries and tolerant retrieval
  • Index construction
  • Index compression
  • Scoring, term weighting & the vector space model
  • Computing scores in a complete search system
  • Evaluation in information retrieval
  • Relevance feedback & query expansion
  • XML retrieval
  • Probabilistic information retrieval
  • Language models for information retrieval
  • Text classification & Naive Bayes
  • Vector space classification
  • Support vector machines & machine learning on documents
  • Flat clustering html
  • Hierarchical clustering
  • Matrix decompositions & latent semantic indexing
  • Web search basics
  • Web crawling and indexes
  • Link analysis
An Introduction to Information Retrieval. Christopher D. Manning; Prabhakar Raghavan; Hinrich Schütze. nlp.stanford.edu . Apr 1, 2009.
